rulings.Case Title: VISHAL GROVER VS. WILLIAM CAMPBELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Vishal Grover'S Motion For An Order Determining That Partial Settlement With Defendants Nrt West, Inc., And David D. Bellings Is In Good Faith [Code Civ. Proc. §877.6]
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Wednesday January 14, 2015 line 3. Plaintiff Vishal Grover'S Motion For An Order Determining That Partial Settlement With Defendants Nrt West, Inc., And David D. Bellings Is In Good Faith [Code Civ. Proc. §877.6] GRANTED. Settling parties' settlement meets the factors of the Tech-Bilt, Inc v. Woodward-Clyde & Associates (1985) 38 Cal.3d 488. All causes of action alleged in the first amended cross-complaint are barred by this settlement. First Amended Cross-Complaint (see paragraph 33) seeks to recover "derivative damages" on the purported direct claims. Gackstetter v. Frawley (2006) 135 Cal.App.4th 1257. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS LAUDERBACH VS. KATHRYN KAIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Renewed Mtn To Compel Pltf'S To Provide Discovery Response Documents And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Wednesday January 14, 2015 line 10. DEFENDANT KATHRYN KAIN Renewed Mtn To Compel Pltf'S To Provide Discovery Response Documents And For Sanctions DENIED, untimely. Responses served June 16, 2014; Automatic Stay June 27, 2014; automatic stay lifted November 12, 2014; Motion filed January 8, 2014. No evidence provided regarding stipulation to extend time to file the motion beyond 45 days provided by statute. Additionally, Defendant's counsel shall address the issue of disclosure of Defendant's and non-party's social security numbers in publicly available court records. =(501/REQ)
